## Gate-5 Release PR (Required)

### Required Links (must be non-empty)
- Evidence dashboard URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/`
- Prior gate PR URL (Gate-4):
- Release template URL:
- Queue entry URL/path (`release/queue.yaml`):
- Promotion evidence URL:
- Smoke evidence URL:

### Strict Checklist (all required)
- [ ] Release candidate and commit SHA are fixed.
- [ ] Queue entry exists with service/env metadata.
- [ ] Release notes identify cluster-specific parameters (if any) without code divergence.
- [ ] Rollback plan is present and tested.
- [ ] Promotion evidence is attached.
- [ ] Smoke result is attached.
- [ ] Acceptance report link is attached.

### Blocking Rule
PR must not merge until every checkbox is checked and required links are filled.
